response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 30+ years of experience, currently working with the exact primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at a senior level. Explicitly involved in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, directly matching required skills. Strong testing/TDD foundation, multiple senior/staff roles, and CS degree align perfectly. Minor concerns around specific framework mentions (Nest.js, Vitest) and secondary languages, but overall foundation is exceptionally strong.
strengths: Currently works with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) in production at senior level, demonstrating fresh hands-on expertise
Explicit experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at current role, directly addressing required AI agent development skill
30+ years of diverse full-stack development (web, mobile, embedded) with proven ability to master multiple languages and technologies
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js background; framework-specific experience would need verification
Vitest not called out, though resume shows extensive testing expertise (TDD emphasis, organized testing workshops)
Secondary language experience (Kotlin, Java) is dated; current depth in these languages unclear

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, testing focus)
Specific framework gaps (Nest.js, Vitest not explicitly listed)
